assignments.name: sender_id
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.message?.from?.id != null ? String($json.body.message.from.id) : ($json.body.edited_message?.from?.id != null ? String($json.body.edited_message.from.id) : ($json.body.callback_query?.from?.id != null ? String($json.body.callback_query.from.id) : "")) }}

assignments.name: secret_valid
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const h = $json.headers || {}; const t = String(h['x-telegram-bot-api-secret-token'] || h['X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token'] || '').trim(); const pathSecret = String($json.params?.webhook_secret || '').trim(); const systemSecret = String($env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET || '').trim(); if (pathSecret === 'platform-bot') { return !systemSecret ? true : (t !== '' && t === systemSecret); } return t !== '' && t === pathSecret; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, mode: $json.command_mode || 'ask', prompt: $json.command_prompt || $json.original_text || $json.text || '', llm_tier: $json.llm_tier || (($json.command_mode === 'research') ? 'reasoning' : (($json.command_mode === 'optimize') ? 'fast' : 'general')), llm_provider: $json.llm_route_provider || null, llm_model: $json.llm_route_model || null, swoop_user_email: $json.swoop_user_email || 'autoro.tech@gmail.com', context: { update_id: $json.update_id || null, message_id: $json.message_id || null, username: $json.username || null } }) }}
